home.howSub: 4 easy steps — your skin in 5 minutes
home.step1Desc: Filter by weapon, wear and float to find the one.
home.step2Desc: Pay directly in MNT with QPay, Storepay or bank.

home.step4Desc: Trade offer arrives within 5 minutes. Accept on Steam.
home.readyEmpty: No ready skins yet. New stock coming soon.
home.preorderEmpty: No pre-order skins available right now.
home.ctaDesc: Split it into 4 with Storepay and grab the skin you want.

faqs.q: How do I buy with Storepay?
faqs.a: Tap Buy with Storepay and sign in — your total is split into 4 interest-free payments. The first installment is charged immediately.

faqs.q: When does the skin become mine?
faqs.a: Once payment clears, the skin is sent via Steam trade offer. Just accept the trade offer in Steam.
No. There is no case opening, roulette, jackpot or betting on our platform — only direct sales from our store inventory.

faqs.q: How long is the trade hold?
faqs.a: Instant if Steam Mobile Authenticator is enabled. Otherwise 7–15 days per Valve's policy.
Based on the average of Steam Market and third-party prices, converted to MNT at the current rate.

qpay.scanHint: Open any bank app and scan the QR. We verify payment automatically.

qpay.label: QPay (QR code)
notes: A QR code is generated automatically after you create the order.
Scan the QR with any bank app to pay.
Once paid, the order is confirmed automatically.

bank.label: Khan Bank (MNT)
notes: Transfer from the Khan Bank app to the account below.
Be sure to put your order number (UBS-XXX) in the payment description — otherwise the order can't be confirmed.
Send the transfer screenshot to @ubskins on Telegram.

wise.label: Wise (TransferWise)
notes: Be sure to include your order number (UBS-XXX) in the reference.
